exercises.title: Mosca Calculation
exercises.description: Apply Mosca inequality to different scenarios.
hints: If x + y > z (z=15-20 years assumed), start now

exercises.title: Progress Tracking
tasks: Research current qubit counts by vendor
hints: Include IBM, Google, IonQ, other vendors

exercises.title: Risk Assessment
exercises.description: Assess organizational risk from quantum computing progress.

exercises.title: Scenario Planning
exercises.description: Create scenarios for different CRQC timelines.
hints: Consider impact on migration urgency and approach
